title: Manage motor sport data
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage motor sport data demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and confirm data acquisition requirements

pcs.text: Team requirements and controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations are used to specify data requirements1.2 Benchmark specifications for a correctly functioning electronic data acquisition system are accessed and interpreted
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Team requirements and controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations are used to specify data requirements1.2 Benchmark specifications for a correctly functioning electronic data acquisition system are accessed and interpreted?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Team requirements and controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations are used to specify data requirements1.2 Benchmark specifications for a correctly functioning electronic data acquisition system are accessed and interpreted.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and confirm data acquisition requirements

elements.title: Configure electronic data acquisition system

pcs.text: Tools and material to support data acquisition process are selected and prepared2.2 Component rates, ratios and parameters for input sensors are calculated and entered into system math channels2.3 Sample rates most suited to particular data logging channel are entered2.4 System operation is checked according to manufacturer specifications and team requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tools and material to support data acquisition process are selected and prepared2.2 Component rates, ratios and parameters for input sensors are calculated and entered into system math channels2.3 Sample rates most suited to particular data logging channel are entered2.4 System operation is checked according to manufacturer specifications and team requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tools and material to support data acquisition process are selected and prepared2.2 Component rates, ratios and parameters for input sensors are calculated and entered into system math channels2.3 Sample rates most suited to particular data logging channel are entered2.4 System operation is checked according to manufacturer specifications and team requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Configure electronic data acquisition system

elements.title: Retrieve data

pcs.text: Data acquisition system start-up procedure is carried out according to manufacturer procedures3.2 Data acquisition system is operated according to its designed capacity and purpose, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements3.3 Retrieved data is verified, where appropriate, using reliable alternative or optional processes according to team requirements3.4 Data parameter variables and potential for inaccurate results are identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Data acquisition system start-up procedure is carried out according to manufacturer procedures3.2 Data acquisition system is operated according to its designed capacity and purpose, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements3.3 Retrieved data is verified, where appropriate, using reliable alternative or optional processes according to team requirements3.4 Data parameter variables and potential for inaccurate results are identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Data acquisition system start-up procedure is carried out according to manufacturer procedures3.2 Data acquisition system is operated according to its designed capacity and purpose, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements3.3 Retrieved data is verified, where appropriate, using reliable alternative or optional processes according to team requirements3.4 Data parameter variables and potential for inaccurate results are identified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Retrieve data

elements.title: Analyse data

pcs.text: Sources of collected data are compared for consistency4.2 Data is analysed using mathematical processes4.3 Trends and patterns in data are analysed, including non-conforming results outside of predicted outcomes4.4 Possible reasons for trends and patterns are investigated4.5 Potential vehicle performance enhancement solutions are identified4.6 Problems with required data or operation of equipment are reported to appropriate persons
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sources of collected data are compared for consistency4.2 Data is analysed using mathematical processes4.3 Trends and patterns in data are analysed, including non-conforming results outside of predicted outcomes4.4 Possible reasons for trends and patterns are investigated4.5 Potential vehicle performance enhancement solutions are identified4.6 Problems with required data or operation of equipment are reported to appropriate persons?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sources of collected data are compared for consistency4.2 Data is analysed using mathematical processes4.3 Trends and patterns in data are analysed, including non-conforming results outside of predicted outcomes4.4 Possible reasons for trends and patterns are investigated4.5 Potential vehicle performance enhancement solutions are identified4.6 Problems with required data or operation of equipment are reported to appropriate persons.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Analyse data

elements.title: Present data

pcs.text: End users of statistical data and their preferred format are identified5.2 Data is represented to meet end user needs5.3 Recommendations are documented and presented with supporting data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can End users of statistical data and their preferred format are identified5.2 Data is represented to meet end user needs5.3 Recommendations are documented and presented with supporting data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can End users of statistical data and their preferred format are identified5.2 Data is represented to meet end user needs5.3 Recommendations are documented and presented with supporting data.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Present data

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Equipment and support material are cleaned, maintained and prepared ready for further use according to manufacturer procedures and team requirements6.2 Faults in acquisition systems and components are diagnosed6.3 Unserviceable equipment and faults are documented and appropriate action is taken according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Equipment and support material are cleaned, maintained and prepared ready for further use according to manufacturer procedures and team requirements6.2 Faults in acquisition systems and components are diagnosed6.3 Unserviceable equipment and faults are documented and appropriate action is taken according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Equipment and support material are cleaned, maintained and prepared ready for further use according to manufacturer procedures and team requirements6.2 Faults in acquisition systems and components are diagnosed6.3 Unserviceable equipment and faults are documented and appropriate action is taken according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
